name: trapeza
description: Trapeza — a calibration-aware broker/clearinghouse for agent-to-agent nanopayment markets on Arc + Circle.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/oracle packages/clearinghouse packages/adapter-arc packages/adapter-gateway packages/store-sqlite packages/provider-llm packages/runtime apps/mcp apps/sim apps/showcase
scripts.solver:install: python3.12 -m venv solver/.venv && solver/.venv/bin/pip install -r solver/requirements.txt
scripts.solver: cd solver && env -u PYTHONPATH .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn trapeza_solver.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run solver:test
